basic_details.job_title: DHFWS Rampurhat Medical Officer Recruitment 2025 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: District Health and Family Welfare Samiti (DHFWS Rampurhat) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 01 Medical Officer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official DHFWS Rampurhat website. The last date to submit the application form is 03-12-2025. In this article, you’ll find the DHFWS Rampurhat Medical Officer Posts recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and Online application form.

qualification.details: MBBS degree from an institution recognized by Medical Council of India Must have completed compulsory rotatory internship Must be registered under West Bengal Medical Council | Maximum 67 years as on 01/01/2025

selection_process: Academic marks (MBBS) – 80 marks Post Graduate Degree/Diploma – 10 marks Experience – 10 marks (2 marks for each completed year of post-qualification experience
max 10 marks) Final merit list will be prepared accordingly
how_to_apply: Go to “Recruitment” section or directly visit the online application portal
Register and fill the online application form
Upload scanned copies of required documents (Photo, Signature, MBBS marksheets, Registration certificate, Experience certificates, etc.)
